if it helps, I'm lowkey a sheltered adult who can barely travel alone in the city cause I get lost easily but is too anxious to ask for help
i am the kind of person, for example i go into the supermarket but can't find the aisles i want but i find it myself cause my shy ass cant give a damn word to asking for directions
LIKE I'D RATHER SPIN IN CIRCLES OR LIKE USE GOOGLE MAPS

the type that if I get the wrong order, the chances of me suffering in silence, is higher than me arguing to change it XD

I'm the runt of the pack lmfao

u have to stand there, smiling infront of your angry customers when u have lost your pet, your car is breaking down, bad economy,...

cause IDK, my country is shit but we have state universities where you only pay for your own welfare
im not American but from what i've heard, student loans are like ticket to be the government's slaves
fr like that's scares the sht out of me
it forces you to be in debt for at least 20 years
I'm a government scholar too (like cause I have a science course) but all they ask was an equivalent year of me availing the scholarship to me working in the country
not drown me in debt or something
scare the crap out of me fr
fr like they're talking abt thousands of dollars in debt
